core_mechanism: a weakly-nonlinear mode-coupling cascade onto an attractor in which higher Fourier harmonics phase-lock to integer multiples of a fundamental mode's complex frequency, yielding a self-similar geometric amplitude hierarchy where each harmonic's amplitude is a fixed power of the fundamental's (a_n = alpha^{n-1} a_1^n)
brief_reason: The abstract derives a closed asymptotic attractor in which the n-th harmonic's frequency locks to n times the fundamental's complex frequency and the amplitude envelopes obey the multiplicative cascading relation J_n = alpha^{n-1} J_1^n, which is exactly a nonlinear harmonic mode-coupling cascade with frequency locking.
